name: v2 sshd success after failures
description: Successful sshd login on a host preceded by three or more failed password attempts on the same host within 10 minutes. The EQL sequence keys by host.name; same-user join would be more precise but the system.auth integration does not extract user.name from the sshd 'Failed password for X' message reliably across PAM and openssh log lines.
query:
sequence by host.name with maxspan=10m
  [any where process.name == "sshd" and event.outcome == "failure"] with runs=3
  [any where process.name == "sshd" and event.outcome == "success"]
